overall.description: A first-person perspective video from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a luxury rooftop pool deck at sunset, transitioning to a panoramic view of a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape at night, then exploring a stylish rooftop lounge with neon lighting and interactive elements.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the marble pool surface toward the modern glass building

entered.detail: circular metal drain cover visible on the white marble pool floor
elevated wooden platform with horizontal slats
contemporary building with large reflective glass windows
white cushioned lounge chairs arranged on the wooden deck

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a luxurious rooftop pool deck during golden hour. The camera moves forward across the reflective marble pool surface toward a modern glass building, with wooden decking and lounge chairs visible to the right. Warm sunlight creates long shadows and a serene atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise cityscape overlook with neon advertisements

events.description: hard cut from sunset pool deck to night-time cyberpunk cityscape view
camera begins slow pan right across the city skyline

agents.ego_description: standing at the rooftop edge panning across the illuminated cityscape

entered.detail: tall building with prominent red neon signage at top
skyscraper featuring large vertical digital billboard with cat advertisement
dark tower with large illuminated white '03' signage
streams of vehicle lights visible on streets far below

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a night-time view of a dense cyberpunk metropolis. The camera pans slowly across towering skyscrapers adorned with bright neon billboards and advertisements, including a distinctive building marked with '03'. The city sprawls below with visible traffic streams.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop lounge with pergola and neon accent lighting

events.description: moves from open city overlook into covered rooftop lounge area
ambient city light replaced by focused red and cyan neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit lounge examining tables and seating areas

entered.detail: metal slat roof structure providing partial cover over the lounge
round table with illuminated cyan base
tall leafy plants in planters dividing the space
red neon light strips along the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a semi-enclosed rooftop lounge featuring a metal pergola overhead. The space is illuminated by cyan glowing tables and red neon accent lights, with potted plants providing greenery. The building with the '03' sign remains visible in the background as the camera explores the seating area.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge interior near bar entrance with interactive objects

events.description: approaches table with drink, UI prompt appears indicating item interaction

agents.ego_description: approaching a table with a drink, then moving toward an interior doorway

entered.detail: dark entrance with red lighting visible inside
illuminated framed poster on the wall near the door
modern chairs with glowing ring bases

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the lounge toward a specific table with a drink item, triggering a game interaction prompt. The area features modern lounge chairs with neon bases and a doorway leading to an interior space with red lighting. The wet marble floor reflects the ambient neon lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene, sun-drenched rooftop pool into the vibrant, neon-saturated depths of a cyberpunk metropolis at night. It begins by gliding across a reflective marble pool surface toward a modern glass building, where warm golden hour sunlight casts long shadows over wooden decking and lounge chairs. The scene then shifts abruptly to a panoramic night view, panning across a dense cityscape of towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards, including a prominent building marked with a 03 sign. As the camera moves inward, the environment transforms into a semi-enclosed rooftop lounge under a metal pergola, where the lighting shifts to cyan glowing tables and red neon accents amidst potted greenery. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the lounge toward a drink on a table, passing neon-based chairs and a red-lit doorway while the wet marble floor reflects the surrounding ambient lights.
